tagline: Fixed sorting on temporal categorical axes: Resolved an issue where sorting did not work correctly on temporal categorical axes.
what_it_does: Fixed sorting on temporal categorical axes: Resolved an issue where sorting did not work correctly on temporal categorical axes. Numeric formatting as Bytes: Users can now format numeric values as Bytes. Totals in histogram tooltips: Histograms now display totals in tooltips.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Fixed sorting on temporal categorical axes: Resolved an issue where sorting did not work correctly on temporal categorical axes. Numeric formatting as Bytes: Users can now format numeric values as Bytes.
key_takeaway: Fixed sorting on temporal categorical axes: Resolved an issue where sorting did not work correctly on temporal categorical axes.
